case_title: ROPER, JOHN (RESPONDENT) vs. ACE RECOVERY, INC. (APPELLANT)

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROPER, JOHN (RESPONDENT) HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 220
NOTICE OF TRIAL FILED BY THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
THIS FILING WAS TAKEN AT INSISTANCE OF SUPERVISOR. THE PROOF OF SERVICE OF MAILING IS MISSING.
NOTICE OF REPRESENTATION OF RESPONDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROPER, JOHN (RESPONDENT)
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 206, MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL, CALENDAR OF SEP-18-1998, GRANTED TRIAL CONTINUED TO DEC-03-1998 AT 09:00 AM

VISITING JUDGE RICHARD KOSSOW, K.LEE/CLERK, D.DISBROW/CSR 09:21AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. JOHN REYMAN CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF MIYE GOISHI FOR THE RESPONDENT, JOHN ROPER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE APPELLANT OR ATTY ACE RECOVERY, INC. APPEAL IS DISMISSED ON THE RECORD. 09:42AM ROBERT HUNIECUTT FOR THE APELLANT ACE RECOVERY MAKES APPEARANCE BUT IS INFORMED THAT THE MATTER HAS BEEN HEARD.
NOTICE OF ASSOCIATION OF COUNSEL FILED BY THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACE RECOVERY, INC. (APPELLANT) THE DEFENDANT'S/APPELLANT'S APPEAL IS DISMISSED AND THE DECISION OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER IS REINSTATED. THE PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT IS ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES AND THE COSTS PER COST BILL. THE LABOR COMMISSIONER DECISION IN #11-17095-01-MD WAS AWARDED TO ROPER FOR $ 2,615.95.
THE NINETY ONE DOLLAR FILING FEE, IN THIS CASE, WAS PAID BY ROBERT L. HUNNIECUTT, ATTORNEY FOR APPELLANT, DEFENDANT, ACE RECOVERY, INC. A CORPORATION.
NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROPER, JOHN (RESPONDENT) AS TO DEFENDANT ACE RECOVERY, INC. (APPELLANT) STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER Y SHEET FILED.
